SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[NumDocument], [p].[Projet_Id], [p].[QuantiteEncre], [p].[QuantiteVernis], [p].[ReferenceArticleSup], [p0].[Id], [p0].[DateDebut], [p0].[DateFin], [p0].[DateLivraisonPrev], [p0].[Description], [p0].[Intitule], [p0].[NumeroDossier], [p0].[ReferenceArticle], [p0].[ReferenceClient], [p0].[TypeDescription], [p0].[id_typeprojet], [p0].[chargeCompte], [p0].[quantite], [t].[Id], [t].[Abrege], [t].[Intitule], [t].[Reference], [s].[Id], [s].[DateCreation], [s].[Laize], [s].[machine], [s].[MetrageLineaire], [s].[NumPiece], [s].[Passe], [s].[Pf_id], [s].[QuantiteSupport], [s].[quantite], [s].[cbmarq], [s].[EL_Intitule], [s].[N_File]
FROM [pf] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [Projet] AS [p0] ON [p].[Projet_Id] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [TypeProjet] AS [t] ON [p0].[id_typeprojet] = [t].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[DateCreation], [b].[Laize], [b].[machine], [b].[MetrageLineaire], [b].[NumPiece], [b].[Passe], [b].[Pf_id], [b].[QuantiteSupport], [b].[quantite], [f].[cbmarq], [f].[EL_Intitule], [f].[N_File]
    FROM [bf] AS [b]
    LEFT JOIN [F_ENUMLIBRECIAL] AS [f] ON [b].[machine] = [f].[cbmarq]
) AS [s] ON [p].[Id] = [s].[Pf_id]
ORDER BY [p].[Id], [p0].[Id], [t].[Id], [s].[Id]

SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[NumDocument], [p].[Projet_Id], [p].[QuantiteEncre], [p].[QuantiteVernis], [p].[ReferenceArticleSup], [p0].[Id], [p0].[DateDebut], [p0].[DateFin], [p0].[DateLivraisonPrev], [p0].[Description], [p0].[Intitule], [p0].[NumeroDossier], [p0].[ReferenceArticle], [p0].[ReferenceClient], [p0].[TypeDescription], [p0].[id_typeprojet], [p0].[chargeCompte], [p0].[quantite], [t].[Id], [t].[Abrege], [t].[Intitule], [t].[Reference], [s].[Id], [s].[DateCreation], [s].[Laize], [s].[machine], [s].[MetrageLineaire], [s].[NumPiece], [s].[Passe], [s].[Pf_id], [s].[QuantiteSupport], [s].[quantite], [s].[cbmarq], [s].[EL_Intitule], [s].[N_File]
FROM [pf] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [Projet] AS [p0] ON [p].[Projet_Id] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [TypeProjet] AS [t] ON [p0].[id_typeprojet] = [t].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[DateCreation], [b].[Laize], [b].[machine], [b].[MetrageLineaire], [b].[NumPiece], [b].[Passe], [b].[Pf_id], [b].[QuantiteSupport], [b].[quantite], [f].[cbmarq], [f].[EL_Intitule], [f].[N_File]
    FROM [bf] AS [b]
    LEFT JOIN [F_ENUMLIBRECIAL] AS [f] ON [b].[machine] = [f].[cbmarq]
) AS [s] ON [p].[Id] = [s].[Pf_id]
ORDER BY [p].[Id], [p0].[Id], [t].[Id], [s].[Id]

FROM [pf] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [Projet] AS [p0] ON [p].[Projet_Id] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [TypeProjet] AS [t] ON [p0].[id_typeprojet] = [t].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[DateCreation], [b].[Laize], [b].[machine], [b].[MetrageLineaire], [b].[NumPiece], [b].[Passe], [b].[Pf_id], [b].[QuantiteSupport], [b].[quantite], [f].[cbmarq], [f].[EL_Intitule], [f].[N_File]
    FROM [bf] AS [b]
    LEFT JOIN [F_ENUMLIBRECIAL] AS [f] ON [b].[machine] = [f].[cbmarq]
) AS [s] ON [p].[Id] = [s].[Pf_id]
ORDER BY [p].[Id], [p0].[Id], [t].[Id], [s].[Id]

    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[DateCreation], [b].[Laize], [b].[machine], [b].[MetrageLineaire], [b].[NumPiece], [b].[Passe], [b].[Pf_id], [b].[QuantiteSupport], [b].[quantite], [f].[cbmarq], [f].[EL_Intitule], [f].[N_File]
    FROM [bf] AS [b]

) AS [s] ON [p].[Id] = [s].[Pf_id]

SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[NumDocument], [p].[Projet_Id], [p].[QuantiteEncre], [p].[QuantiteVernis], [p].[ReferenceArticleSup], [p0].[Id], [p0].[DateDebut], [p0].[DateFin], [p0].[DateLivraisonPrev], [p0].[Description], [p0].[Intitule], [p0].[NumeroDossier], [p0].[ReferenceArticle], [p0].[ReferenceClient], [p0].[TypeDescription], [p0].[id_typeprojet], [p0].[chargeCompte], [p0].[quantite], [t].[Id], [t].[Abrege], [t].[Intitule], [t].[Reference], [s].[Id], [s].[DateCreation], [s].[Laize], [s].[machine], [s].[MetrageLineaire], [s].[NumPiece], [s].[Passe], [s].[Pf_id], [s].[QuantiteSupport], [s].[quantite], [s].[cbmarq], [s].[EL_Intitule], [s].[N_File]
FROM [pf] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [Projet] AS [p0] ON [p].[Projet_Id] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [TypeProjet] AS [t] ON [p0].[id_typeprojet] = [t].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[DateCreation], [b].[Laize], [b].[machine], [b].[MetrageLineaire], [b].[NumPiece], [b].[Passe], [b].[Pf_id], [b].[QuantiteSupport], [b].[quantite], [f].[cbmarq], [f].[EL_Intitule], [f].[N_File]
    FROM [bf] AS [b]
    LEFT JOIN [F_ENUMLIBRECIAL] AS [f] ON [b].[machine] = [f].[cbmarq]
) AS [s] ON [p].[Id] = [s].[Pf_id]
ORDER BY [p].[Id], [p0].[Id], [t].[Id], [s].[Id]

SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[NumDocument], [p].[Projet_Id], [p].[QuantiteEncre], [p].[QuantiteVernis], [p].[ReferenceArticleSup], [p0].[Id], [p0].[DateDebut], [p0].[DateFin], [p0].[DateLivraisonPrev], [p0].[Description], [p0].[Intitule], [p0].[NumeroDossier], [p0].[ReferenceArticle], [p0].[ReferenceClient], [p0].[TypeDescription], [p0].[id_typeprojet], [p0].[chargeCompte], [p0].[quantite], [t].[Id], [t].[Abrege], [t].[Intitule], [t].[Reference], [s].[Id], [s].[DateCreation], [s].[Laize], [s].[machine], [s].[MetrageLineaire], [s].[NumPiece], [s].[Passe], [s].[Pf_id], [s].[QuantiteSupport], [s].[quantite], [s].[cbmarq], [s].[EL_Intitule], [s].[N_File]
FROM [pf] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [Projet] AS [p0] ON [p].[Projet_Id] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [TypeProjet] AS [t] ON [p0].[id_typeprojet] = [t].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[DateCreation], [b].[Laize], [b].[machine], [b].[MetrageLineaire], [b].[NumPiece], [b].[Passe], [b].[Pf_id], [b].[QuantiteSupport], [b].[quantite], [f].[cbmarq], [f].[EL_Intitule], [f].[N_File]
    FROM [bf] AS [b]
    LEFT JOIN [F_ENUMLIBRECIAL] AS [f] ON [b].[machine] = [f].[cbmarq]
) AS [s] ON [p].[Id] = [s].[Pf_id]
ORDER BY [p].[Id], [p0].[Id], [t].[Id], [s].[Id]

SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[NumDocument], [p].[Projet_Id], [p].[QuantiteEncre], [p].[QuantiteVernis], [p].[ReferenceArticleSup], [p0].[Id], [p0].[DateDebut], [p0].[DateFin], [p0].[DateLivraisonPrev], [p0].[Description], [p0].[Intitule], [p0].[NumeroDossier], [p0].[ReferenceArticle], [p0].[ReferenceClient], [p0].[TypeDescription], [p0].[id_typeprojet], [p0].[chargeCompte], [p0].[quantite], [t].[Id], [t].[Abrege], [t].[Intitule], [t].[Reference], [s].[Id], [s].[DateCreation], [s].[Laize], [s].[machine], [s].[MetrageLineaire], [s].[NumPiece], [s].[Passe], [s].[Pf_id], [s].[QuantiteSupport], [s].[quantite], [s].[cbmarq], [s].[EL_Intitule], [s].[N_File]

LEFT JOIN [TypeProjet] AS [t] ON [p0].[id_typeprojet] = [t].[Id]

    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[DateCreation], [b].[Laize], [b].[machine], [b].[MetrageLineaire], [b].[NumPiece], [b].[Passe], [b].[Pf_id], [b].[QuantiteSupport], [b].[quantite], [f].[cbmarq], [f].[EL_Intitule], [f].[N_File]

SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[NumDocument], [p].[Projet_Id], [p].[QuantiteEncre], [p].[QuantiteVernis], [p].[ReferenceArticleSup], [p0].[Id], [p0].[DateDebut], [p0].[DateFin], [p0].[DateLivraisonPrev], [p0].[Description], [p0].[Intitule], [p0].[NumeroDossier], [p0].[ReferenceArticle], [p0].[ReferenceClient], [p0].[TypeDescription], [p0].[id_typeprojet], [p0].[chargeCompte], [p0].[quantite], [t].[Id], [t].[Abrege], [t].[Intitule], [t].[Reference], [s].[Id], [s].[DateCreation], [s].[Laize], [s].[machine], [s].[MetrageLineaire], [s].[NumPiece], [s].[Passe], [s].[Pf_id], [s].[QuantiteSupport], [s].[quantite], [s].[cbmarq], [s].[EL_Intitule], [s].[N_File]
FROM [pf] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [Projet] AS [p0] ON [p].[Projet_Id] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [TypeProjet] AS [t] ON [p0].[id_typeprojet] = [t].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[DateCreation], [b].[Laize], [b].[machine], [b].[MetrageLineaire], [b].[NumPiece], [b].[Passe], [b].[Pf_id], [b].[QuantiteSupport], [b].[quantite], [f].[cbmarq], [f].[EL_Intitule], [f].[N_File]
    FROM [bf] AS [b]
    LEFT JOIN [F_ENUMLIBRECIAL] AS [f] ON [b].[machine] = [f].[cbmarq]
) AS [s] ON [p].[Id] = [s].[Pf_id]
ORDER BY [p].[Id], [p0].[Id], [t].[Id], [s].[Id]

SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[NumDocument], [p].[Projet_Id], [p].[QuantiteEncre], [p].[QuantiteVernis], [p].[ReferenceArticleSup], [p0].[Id], [p0].[DateDebut], [p0].[DateFin], [p0].[DateLivraisonPrev], [p0].[Description], [p0].[Intitule], [p0].[NumeroDossier], [p0].[ReferenceArticle], [p0].[ReferenceClient], [p0].[TypeDescription], [p0].[id_typeprojet], [p0].[chargeCompte], [p0].[quantite], [t].[Id], [t].[Abrege], [t].[Intitule], [t].[Reference], [b].[Id], [b].[DateCreation], [b].[Laize], [b].[machine], [b].[MetrageLineaire], [b].[NumPiece], [b].[Passe], [b].[Pf_id], [b].[QuantiteSupport], [b].[quantite]
FROM [pf] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [Projet] AS [p0] ON [p].[Projet_Id] = [p0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [TypeProjet] AS [t] ON [p0].[id_typeprojet] = [t].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [bf] AS [b] ON [p].[Id] = [b].[Pf_id]
ORDER BY [p].[Id], [p0].[Id], [t].[Id]
